notes: F006 is a security foundation feature. Two modules (credentials.py + auth.py) + a redaction filter + one API route. Single-user install per D052; no multi-user story. UX Researcher confirms the target segment (retail forex trader on their own machine) and the 'password never leaves my machine' framing before UI Designer starts.
review_criteria: Confirm single-user install is the right scope for the target audience
Confirm the 'fingerprint chip, not the full token' framing survives an accessibility check
Identify what F006 does NOT try to solve (feeds F007/F008 spec cross-links)
